visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with red cherry-shaped hair clips and a striped shirt faces the camera. She begins her skincare routine by applying a small tube of product to her forehead while speaking expressively. The background is a tidy indoor room with warm, bright lighting. Her facial expressions are animated as she introduces the story. (2) She holds up a purple jar of "PROBIODERM" cream, demonstrating the product to the viewer. Using a white cotton pad, she carefully wipes her forehead and facial skin. The lighting remains bright and consistent. She continues her narrative about her ex-boyfriend, using hand gestures to emphasize her points and maintain engagement. (3) The woman uses a pink spray bottle to mist her face, closing her eyes briefly. She then dabs her skin with a cotton swab and applies cushion foundation to her cheeks. Her movements are practiced and rhythmic, synchronizing with her storytelling. The setting remains stable, focusing on her upper body and face. (4) She applies a specialized white lifting patch to her neck and sprays it again. Later, she styles her hair with a curling iron and applies lip products. The video ends with her posing with a peace sign and holding up the featured skincare products, smiling at the camera to conclude.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 渣男前男友居然說台灣女生都很懶😂. [Slogan]: 韓國渣男故事. (2) [Subtitle]: 之前超級多人許願的. (3) [Subtitle]: 韓國前男友(渣男)故事來了. (4) [Subtitle]: 其中一位 我會忘不了他. (5) [Subtitle]: 是因為他有天突然說. [Slogan]: “台灣女生都很懶”. (6) [Subtitle]: 超級問號 對吧?. [Variety]: 😟. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且我是韓國人 笑死. (8) [Subtitle]: 先說，我真的不靠外表評價人. (9) [Subtitle]: 但現在想起來 他超級難看. (10) [Subtitle]: 身高不到170. (11) [Subtitle]: 但我真的不怎麼看外表啦. (12) [Subtitle]: 有一天他突然說. [Slogan]: 我不喜歡女生穿褲子. (13) [Slogan]: 我比較愛裙子. (14) [Subtitle]: 什麼鬼. (15) [Subtitle]: 有一天我的女生朋友來台灣找我玩. (16) [Subtitle]: 我已經提前跟他說. (17) [Subtitle]: 今天可能不太看訊息. (18) [Subtitle]: 因為人在九份嘛. (19) [Subtitle]: 結果2-3小時沒回他. (20) [Subtitle]: 他直接暴走. (21) [Subtitle]: 講話超難聽. (22) [Subtitle]: 我受不了就把手機關. (23) [Subtitle]: 隔天打給他. (24) [Subtitle]: 他又開始亂講. (25) [Subtitle]: 而且他不是單純憤怒的那種. (26) [Subtitle]: 西~西~. [Variety]: 犀牛?. (27) [Subtitle]: 我說: 你是不是快要罵髒話了?. (28) [Subtitle]: 他回答: “我對前任都罵過啊”. (29) [Subtitle]: “只有你我還沒罵”. (30) [Subtitle]: 神經病. (31) [Subtitle]: 當天先安撫他(我不會跟怪人吵架). (32) [Subtitle]: 隔天直接按訊息分手. (33) [Subtitle]: 於是他開始狂傳訊息. (34) [Subtitle]: 馬上道歉，拜託我不要分手. (35) [Subtitle]: 狂打電話40次以上. (36) [Subtitle]: 最扯的是. (37) [Subtitle]: 他嫌我常叫外送. (38) [Subtitle]: 我一開始好好說明. (39) [Subtitle]: 台灣有專門早餐店，外送費還行. (40) [Subtitle]: 他居然說: 啊~. [Slogan]: 所以台灣女生就是懶. (41) [Subtitle]: gan尼披薩. (42) [Subtitle]: 這種人最可怕的就是. (43) [Subtitle]: 一開始都裝得超好、超溫柔. (44) [Subtitle]: 結果某個瞬間就露理解爪. (45) [Subtitle]: 太突然，但這個膠原貼片超好用. (46) [Subtitle]: 韓國Olive Young第一名品牌!. (47) [Subtitle]: 超級好用 團購已經進行中喔. (48) [Subtitle]: 也不是要罵所有韓國男生啦. (49) [Subtitle]: 反正一句話. (50) [Subtitle]: 大家真的要小心渣男!. (51) [Subtitle]: 記得聽歐膩的話喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark brown hair decorated with red cherry hair clips, wearing a blue and white striped button-up shirt with a navy blue knit sweater draped over her shoulders.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor room, possibly a bedroom or dressing area, with white closet doors and neutral-colored walls. A chair or fan is partially visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The sequence begins with an energetic female narrator speaking in Traditional Chinese over a driving electronic background track. The music features a consistent beat and a major-key tonality. The narrator's voice is high-arousal and expressive, with varied pitch contours that reflect her storytelling excitement. The recording quality is studio-clean with no background noise. (2) A distinct misting sound occurs (0:19) as the narrator uses a spray bottle. This transient sound effect is layered cleanly over the continuing upbeat music and the narrator's enthusiastic delivery. Her speech rate remains fast but clearly articulated, maintaining a high level of engagement while the background music provides a rhythmic pulse. (3) The audio texture is punctuated by rhythmic, soft thumping sounds (0:30) as the narrator applies makeup with a cushion foundation puff. These sounds are subtle but audible in the mix. The BGM maintains its tempo, and the narrator's voice transitions into a more dramatic, sarcastic tone to describe her ex-boyfriend's comments. (4) A sharp, bright variety-style "ding" sound effect (0:42) triggers a shift in the acoustic atmosphere. The narrator's voice rises in pitch to express mock surprise. The background music continues unabated, providing a stable energetic foundation. The interaction between the vocal prosody and the post-production sound effects creates a highly dynamic listening experience. (5) The misting spray sound returns (1:17), providing a recurring acoustic motif. The narrator's tone becomes more informative as she starts to recommend the products she is using. The BGM remains consistent in volume and energy, ensuring the vocal signal-to-noise ratio remains excellent throughout the transition from storytelling to endorsement. (6) The narration concludes with a friendly, high-pitched sign-off. The background music maintains its energy until the very end of the clip. The interplay between the narrator's lively speech patterns and the professional-grade electronic track results in a polished, commercial-ready audio production with no technical distortions or unwanted environmental interference.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Storytelling with Parallel Demo -> Climax -> Product Promotion -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a personal storytelling format (recounting an experience with a 'scumbag' ex-boyfriend) as a hook to engage viewers while simultaneously demonstrating and endorsing skincare products from the brand BIOHEAL BOH.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator displays the products prominently, names the brand, mentions a 'group buy' in the text overlays, and specifically highlights product benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media influencer video combining high-engagement storytelling with commercial product placement. The fast editing and text-heavy visual style are designed for mobile platforms.
